name: Garrick Ironbrew
description: *The tavern's proprietor polishes glasses while keeping a watchful eye on his establishment, ready with advice or supplies.*

recruitment.success_text: Garrick chuckles warmly. 'I appreciate the offer, but someone's got to keep this place running while you're off saving the world!'

initial: Welcome to the Broken Blade! You look like you've got adventure in your eyes.
Things have been... unsettled around here lately.
If you're looking for information or supplies, you've come to the right place.
pre_mayor: Word of advice - talk to Mayor Goldenbottom if you're planning anything official.
These disappearances have him on edge, and he's coordinating all the responses.
Those old Hill Ruins north of town have been too quiet as well.
Need any supplies before you head out? I keep basic gear in stock.
post_mayor: So you've spoken with the Mayor about the troubles, eh?
Those Hill Ruins I mentioned - something's definitely not right there.
I can mark it on your map if you're planning to investigate.
Need any supplies before you head out? I keep basic gear in stock.
post_recruitment: Good to see you're not going alone into danger!
Your companions look capable - you'll need every advantage.
Want to stock up on supplies before you venture forth?
return_visits: Need a drink?  I also have basic gear in stock.
party_full: Excellent! A proper adventuring party at last!
You'll want supplies for the whole group before heading out.
My shop has everything from rations to rope.
already_recruited: *This should never appear since bartender can't be recruited*
